rewrites.expression: | lookup device_os, device_ip, device_agentuuid, device_lastuser, device_site, device_criticality, device_riskfactors from {{ENDPOINT_TABLE}} by hostname = {{HOSTNAME_FIELD}}
| lookup user_principal, user_sid, user_domain, user_dn, user_groups, user_privileged, user_criticality, user_riskfactors from {{IDENTITY_TABLE}} by username = {{USERNAME_FIELD}}
